Id1.text: Alex Plante was born in Canada; where the national anthem is O Canada and the leader is, Elizabeth II.

Id2.text: Alex Plante was born in Canada, where the leader is Elizabeth II and the national anthem is O Canada.

Id3.text: Canada, the birthplace of Alex Plante, is led by Elizabeth II and has a national anthem known as "O Canada".
